title: Geology
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Geology''' was the study of planetary processes or referred to planetary processes itself. Those applying its concepts were known as [[Geologist/Legends|geologists]].

[[Groundquake/Legends|Groundquakes]], [[Volcano/Legends|volcanoes]], and [[Geyser/Legends|geysers]] were studied in this field.

Geology was a field studied by the [[Svivreni]] for use in mining.

==Behind the scenes==
Geology was based on the study of the Earth. However in this context, it refers to the study of all planets.
